docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $638.37 FILED BY BLICKMAN TURKUS AS TO DEFENDANT MC CARTHY ROBERT J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MC CARTHY ROBERT J

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLICKMAN TURKUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MC CARTHY ROBERT J $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $236.00, JUDGMENT IS IN SETTLEMENT OF INSTANT CASE AND ALL CLAIMS BY EITHER PARTY AGAINST THE OTHER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MC CARTHY ROBERT J
